title: Snappy Ethiopian Buckwheat Flour Kitfo
description: A rich and satisfying Ethiopian dish featuring buckwheat flour, ideal for a date-night dinner. The tagine cooking method infuses the meat with deep flavors.
instructions: Heat the ghee or oil in a clay pot over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the ginger and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the thyme and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add the ground beef and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add the buckwheat flour and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the salt, black pepper, and kibbeh spice or cumin, and stir to combine.
Transfer the pot to the oven and cook at 300�0176F for 20-25 minutes, or until the meat is cooked through.
Remove the pot from the oven and garnish with parsley and chopped onions if desired.
